title: lippia abyssinica
intro: Lippia abyssinica, also known as African bush tea or Abyssinian tea, is a type of flowering plant native to East Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, headaches, and respiratory issues. The plant is known to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Lippia abyssinica can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or it can be used as a decoction or extract to make tinctures and other medicinal preparations.
